$comment: scripts/MtMoonPokecenter.asm — the MAGIKARP salesman: MONEY_BOX up before the pitch, the ¥500 check, give_mon BEFORE the money leaves (the retired order: _receive_mon → SubBCDPredef → refresh → sfx → received line → the box hidden before the naming screen). The both-full pre-check keeps the money box cleanup on the refusal path (the retired beat's hide-then-return).

then.text:
MAN: How's that
MAGIKARP? Good, isn't it?

else.text:
MAN: Hello, there!
Have I got a deal
just for you! I'll let you have
a swell MAGIKARP
for just ¥500! What do you say?

then.text:
You'll need more
money than that!

Your party and
box are full!

else.text:
No? I'm only
doing this as a
favor to you!
